portfolio.name: Sonu Verma
portfolio.tagline: Full Stack Developer | C++ Programmer | AI/ML Enthusiast
portfolio.about: I am Sonu, a Full Stack Developer, C++ Programmer, and AI/ML Enthusiast currently pursuing B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering. I have experience in building responsive websites, full-stack applications, and interactive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and MySQL.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern and responsive personal portfolio website showcasing my skills, projects, certifications, and contact details. Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with smooth navigation and a clean UI.

projects.title: E-commerce Website - Darkside
projects.description: A responsive e-commerce website with product listings, shopping cart, checkout flow, and smooth user experience. Designed with a modern UI and built using frontend technologies with backend support.

projects.title: Coffee Website
projects.description: A full-stack coffee website with a modern UI, product sections, cart functionality, backend APIs, and database integration. Designed to provide a clean and smooth ordering experience.

projects.title: Food Website
projects.description: A responsive food website showcasing food items, recipes, categories, and contact sections. Built with modern design, attractive visuals, and interactive UI components.

projects.title: Travel Website
projects.description: A responsive travel website designed to showcase destinations, travel tips, booking inquiry sections, and smooth animations for a better user experience.

projects.title: Maze-Solving Robot Car
projects.description: An autonomous robot car designed to solve mazes using IR sensors, Arduino UNO, and L298N motor driver. It uses path-following logic and sensor-based decision-making.

projects.title: AtomQuest Goal Setting & Tracking Portal
projects.description: A digital goal-setting and tracking portal designed to help organizations manage employee goals, quarterly check-ins, alignment, visibility, and performance tracking.

certificates.title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials
certificates.description: Completed AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials and gained understanding of cloud computing fundamentals, AWS services, cloud architecture, security, and deployment concepts.

certificates.title: 6-Week Internship in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
certificates.description: Completed a 6-week AI/ML internship focused on machine learning fundamentals, data processing, model building, and practical AI-based project development.

certificates.title: Accenture Developer & Technology Job Simulation
certificates.description: Completed a virtual job simulation focused on software development, technology consulting, problem-solving, and real-world development tasks.

certificates.title: Software Engineering Job Simulation
certificates.description: Completed JPMorgan Chase Software Engineering Job Simulation and gained practical experience in software engineering workflows, debugging, code optimization, and real-world engineering tasks.

certificates.title: GenAI-Powered Data Analytics Job Simulation
certificates.description: Completed Tata GenAI-Powered Data Analytics Job Simulation, learning how generative AI can support data analysis, insights generation, automation, and business decision-making.

certificates.title: India AI Impact Buildathon
certificates.description: Participated in the India AI Impact Buildathon, a nationwide AI innovation challenge conducted at India AI Impact Summit 2026, demonstrating AI-led problem solving and solution-building skills.

certificates.title: EY Techathon 6.0
certificates.description: Participated in Round 1: Executive Summary Submission of EY Techathon 6.0, gaining exposure to technology-driven problem solving, innovation, and structured solution presentation.

certificates.title: Python Certification
certificates.description: Completed Python certification covering programming fundamentals, logic building, and practical Python concepts.

certificates.title: UI/UX Design Certification
certificates.description: Completed UI/UX design certification focused on user-friendly, responsive, and visually appealing web interfaces.
